privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.intro: Uha is built with privacy as a core principle. This Privacy Policy explains what data Uha collects, how it is used, and how the app's optional network features work.
privacy_policy.collect_body: Uha does not collect personal data. There are no accounts, no sign-ups, no email addresses, and no passwords. I do not track your usage, behavior, or location. The app does not contain analytics or telemetry of any kind.
privacy_policy.local_body: All data you enter in Uha — subscriptions, categories, payment method labels, preferences, custom logos, symbols, and notes — is stored locally on your device using an on-device SQLite database. Payment method labels, such as "Card" or "PayPal", are stored locally. Uha does not store card numbers, bank credentials, or payment account logins. This data never leaves your device unless you explicitly choose to export it or enable iCloud backup. Uha may request currency exchange rates from sharkie.uha.app by sending the dates and currency codes needed for conversion. These requests do not include your subscription names, amounts, notes, or other personal content.
privacy_policy.third_party_intro: Uha uses the following services for specific app and website functions:
privacy_policy.third_party_revenuecat: Manages the in-app purchase and entitlement validation. RevenueCat receives an anonymous app user ID and purchase receipt data from Apple. It does not receive your name, email, or any subscription data you track in the app. See RevenueCat's privacy policy for details.
privacy_policy.third_party_logodev: Uha uses soup.uha.app, my service catalog API, to search for service names, logos, domains, app identifiers, categories, colors, and related metadata. Depending on the search sources enabled in Uha, the catalog may use an in-house database, Brandfetch, Logo.dev, and Apple's iTunes Search API. Search requests can include the text you type, selected source filters, and App Store country settings. Exact service lookups can include a domain or bundle ID. These source integrations are optional and can be turned off in the app settings. These requests are used only to return service metadata and do not include your subscription amounts, payment details, notes, or tracked history.
privacy_policy.third_party_cloudflare: The uha.app website, soup.uha.app service catalog, sharkie.uha.app currency exchange service, and related static assets are served behind Cloudflare. As a CDN, security provider, storage provider, and web analytics provider, Cloudflare may process standard connection metadata such as IP addresses, request headers, timestamps, page URLs, referrers, and basic browser information for content delivery, abuse protection, storage delivery, and privacy-preserving website analytics. See Cloudflare's privacy policy for details.
privacy_policy.third_party_outro: I do not sell your personal data. The integrations above are strictly functional and are not used to build advertising profiles.
privacy_policy.icloud_body: Uha supports optional iCloud backup. When enabled, your subscription data is stored in your personal iCloud account. This data is encrypted and managed entirely by Apple — I have no access to it. iCloud backup is disabled by default and is fully opt-in. No data is sent to iCloud unless you explicitly enable this feature. Apple's own privacy policy governs all data stored in iCloud.
privacy_policy.analytics_body: The Uha iOS app contains no advertising SDKs and does not run product analytics on your local subscription data. I do not know what subscriptions you track, what you pay, or how you organize your library. The uha.app website and public APIs may use Cloudflare Web Analytics and standard server logs for aggregate, privacy-preserving traffic metrics, reliability, and abuse prevention.
privacy_policy.children_body: Uha does not knowingly collect data from children under 13. Since the app does not collect any personal data from any user, there is no age-specific data concern.
privacy_policy.changes_body: I may update this Privacy Policy if my practices change. Updates will be reflected on this page with a revised date.
privacy_policy.contact_body: If you have questions about this policy, you can reach me at mail@uha.app.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of Uha, a subscription management application for iOS developed by Alena Dzhukich ("I", "me", or "my"). By downloading or using Uha, you agree to these terms.
terms.use_body: Uha is provided for personal, non-commercial use. You may use the app to track your subscriptions, manage spending, and organize financial data on your device. You agree not to misuse the app, use it for any unlawful purpose, or use it for commercial purposes. The Uha name, branding, and assets remain the property of the developer.
terms.subscriptions_body: Uha is currently in public beta via Apple TestFlight. TestFlight purchases are for testing; real payments are handled only after App Store release through Apple In-App Purchase. The free tier lets you track up to 3 subscriptions, use the base free currencies, and view up to a 3-year forecast horizon. Uha offers an optional one-time purchase ("Uha Unlimited") that permanently unlocks unlimited subscriptions, all available currencies, a 12-year forecast horizon, and backup/export features. After App Store release, the purchase will be processed through Apple's App Store and managed by RevenueCat using the "Uha Unlimited" entitlement. Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation. As a lifetime purchase, it will not renew or recur. The price is set in USD and may vary by region according to Apple's App Store pricing. I do not process payments directly and have no access to your payment information.
terms.content_body: All subscription data, categories, payment methods, services, custom logos, notes, and preferences you create in Uha are stored locally on your device. I do not have access to your content. You are responsible for maintaining backups of your data. If you delete the app without backing up, your data cannot be recovered.
terms.icloud_body: Uha offers optional iCloud backup as a way to keep your data safe across devices. When enabled, your data is stored in your personal iCloud account, encrypted and managed by Apple. I do not have access to your iCloud data. iCloud backup is entirely opt-in — it is disabled by default and can be turned off at any time. Apple's iCloud terms and privacy policy apply to any data stored there.
terms.third_party_body: Uha integrates with third-party services to provide certain features. RevenueCat is used to manage in-app purchases and purchase validation and is required for paid entitlement checks. The service catalog at soup.uha.app helps Uha search for service names, logos, domains, app identifiers, categories, colors, and related metadata. Depending on the search sources enabled in Uha, it may use an in-house database, Brandfetch, Logo.dev, and Apple's iTunes Search API. These service metadata sources are optional and can be turned off in the app settings. The currency exchange service at sharkie.uha.app provides historical exchange rates for supported currencies. The uha.app website, soup.uha.app, sharkie.uha.app, and related static assets are served behind Cloudflare, which acts as a CDN, security layer, storage provider, and web analytics provider. These services operate under their own terms and privacy policies. I am not responsible for the practices of third-party providers.
terms.termination_body: You may stop using Uha at any time by deleting the app. I reserve the right to modify or discontinue the app at any time without prior notice, though I aim to provide reasonable communication about significant changes.
terms.disclaimer_body: Uha is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, whether express or implied. I do not guarantee that the app will be error-free, uninterrupted, or that it will meet your specific requirements. Uha is a tracking tool and does not provide financial advice. You are solely responsible for your financial decisions.
terms.changes_body: I may update these Terms of Use from time to time. Changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date. Continued use of Uha after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
terms.contact_body: If you have questions about these terms, you can reach me at mail@uha.app.

hero.headline_2:
Keep your subs
on the leash!
hero.subtitle_1: A subscription manager that respects your privacy. All data stays on your device. Available on iOS.
hero.beta_disclaimer: Uha is currently in public beta via Apple TestFlight. TestFlight purchases are for testing; real payments are handled only after App Store release through Apple In-App Purchase.
